scholarships.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) — Pre-Matric Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Students of Class 9-10 from SC/ST/OBC/Minority/PwD families with income below INR 2.5 lakh/year

scholarships.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) — Post-Matric Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Students of Class 11 and above including college students from SC/ST/OBC/Minority families. Family income below INR 2.5 lakh/year.

scholarships.name: Uttarakhand State Merit Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Uttarakhand domicile students who scored 60%+ in Class 12. For UG courses.

scholarships.name: AICTE — Pragati Scholarship for Girls
scholarships.eligibility: Girl students in AICTE-approved technical diploma or degree programs. Family income below INR 8 lakh/year. Only 2 girls per family can avail.

scholarships.name: AICTE — Saksham Scholarship for Differently Abled
scholarships.eligibility: Differently abled students (40%+ disability) in AICTE-approved technical programs. Family income below INR 8 lakh/year.

scholarships.name: IIT Roorkee — Institute Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: IIT Roorkee students with JEE rank. Merit scholarships for top performers each semester.

scholarships.name: Uttarakhand CM Scholarships — Medhaavi Chhatra Protsahan
scholarships.eligibility: Uttarakhand domicile students scoring 80%+ in Class 12 and getting admission in top colleges.

scholarships.name: HDFC Bank Parivartan's ECS (Educational Crisis Scholarship)
scholarships.eligibility: Students from economically backward families who are in 11th/12th or college. Family income below INR 2.5 lakh/year.
